description_long: This is a steampunk-inspired wristwatch featuring a round, copper-toned case with a raised bezel and two prominent, purple-tinted magnifying lenses mounted on articulated arms above the dial. The dial itself is green with visible black and gold hands, and the watch face is partially obscured by the lenses, suggesting a decorative or functional magnification feature. The strap is wide, dark brown, and appears to be made of leather with visible stitching along the edges, attached to the case with metallic lugs. The overall design is robust and industrial, with exposed screws and mechanical elements adding to its vintage, mechanical aesthetic. The watch lacks any visible digital display or subdials, focusing on a classic analog presentation. No brand logo or emblem is visible on the dial, strap, or clasp.
description: A steampunk-style wristwatch with a copper case, green dial, and two purple magnifying lenses, paired with a wide brown leather strap and visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide brown strap, copper case, and both purple magnifying lenses above the green dial.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlights the circular copper case, the articulated magnifying lenses, and the open loop of the leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the strap and case from the opposite side, with the lenses visible in profile.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view reveals the depth of the case, the mounting of the lenses, and the curvature of the strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is green with a simple analog layout, featuring black and gold hands and no visible numerals or indices. The design is partially obscured by two purple-tinted magnifying lenses, giving it a unique, mechanical, and decorative appearance. The overall style is steampunk with no subdials or additional complications.
attribute_strap_type: Wide brown leather strap with visible stitching and metallic lugs, likely a traditional two-piece construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with central hour and minute hands, no numerals or indices, and no visible complications or luminous elements.
